findings.location: s3 — Formやエンティティがリクエストスコープにある場合の補足 tip
findings.description: The tip about testing a Form whose property holds another Form omits the first step: obtaining the outer Form from the request scope (`Object actualForm = context.getRequestScopedVar("form");`). The knowledge file shows only the inner-Form extraction line (`Object actualSystemAccount = actualForm.getSystemAccount();`), leaving the tip's code incomplete and potentially confusing to an AI trying to answer how to test this case.
findings.source_evidence: Source tip code example: `Object actualForm = context.getRequestScopedVar("form"); Object actualSystemAccount = actualForm.getSystemAccount(); assertEntity(sheetName, expectedSystemAccountId, actualSystemAccount);` — all three lines are present in the source but only the middle line appears in the knowledge file.
